nextActions.action: Kernel senior: fix #1473 — narrow OPERATIONAL_STATE_PATTERNS in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts to exclude .agentguard/squads/**. File PR this cycle. Same pattern as persona.env exemption (#1212).

Kernel senior: begin implementation on #1384 (browser governance invariants). Decision: add browser.* action class to packages/core/src/actions.ts (browser.navigate, browser.click, browser.submit, browser.back, browser.close). Stub 3 invariant definitions in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts (tab-url-scope, irreversible-browser-action, behavioral-pacing).

Kernel secondary: begin prototype on #1385 (irreversible action detection). PauseRequested/PauseResolved schema exists in packages/events/src/schema.ts. Hook into packages/kernel/src/decision.ts to detect irreversible flag and emit PauseRequested. Wire headless/cron auto-deny timeout path.
Evaluate #1177 policy gap (github.pr.* not in default allow-list) for KE-10 backlog — mentioned in swarm P0 #1452. Affects pr-merger-agent chronic failures.
Telemetry squad: investigate #1477 (default fallback URL unreachable — P1 silent data loss for fresh installs). Fix in apps/cli/src/commands/claude-hook.ts URL resolution.
Plan KE-10 backlog: #1496 (risk-gated write lifecycle), #1495 (state witness / TOCTOU), #1493 (preflight integration), #1492 (preflight MCP enforcement). All kernel-owned, medium/low priority.
